name: party.js
when_to_use: 需要从某个按钮、答案或文字元素的实际几何位置发射 confetti/sparkles 时用它,而非手算粒子起点——原生在元素锚定、变化区间与 DOM 粒子三维变换上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认能做全屏粒子,却做不到稳定地从任意 DOM 元素边界采样发射点并组合数量、速度、尺寸变化；party.js 把元素锚定与成熟模板封装为原生函数。

data_in.note: targetSelector 相对 party-stage 查询并必须命中 HTMLElement；effect 直接映射上游 party.confetti/party.sparkles,count 用 party.variation.range。

schema.targetSelector: string —— party-stage 内唯一锚点的 CSS selector
schema.count?: [non-negative number,non-negative number] —— 随机范围；省略时用上游默认:confetti 20..40,sparkles 10..20

spec.note: party-stage 默认显式 120px 高,供锚点完成布局后再采样几何。上游粒子根层固定挂 document.body 并覆盖 viewport,不受该高度裁剪；禁用 vh/百分比高度作为 stage 尺寸。

en.when_to_use: Use it to emit confetti or sparkles from the actual geometry of a button, answer, or text element instead of calculating particle origins by hand, which tends to fail at element anchoring, variation ranges, and 3D transforms for DOM particles.
en.why_valuable: AI can produce full-screen particles but cannot reliably sample an emission point from arbitrary DOM-element bounds and combine count, velocity, and size variation. party.js packages element anchoring and mature templates as native functions.

data_in.note: targetSelector is queried relative to party-stage and must match an HTMLElement. effect maps directly to upstream party.confetti/party.sparkles, and count uses party.variation.range.

schema.targetSelector: string -- CSS selector for a unique anchor inside party-stage
schema.count?: [non-negative number,non-negative number] -- random range; when omitted, uses upstream defaults: confetti 20..40, sparkles 10..20

spec.note: party-stage has an explicit default height of 120px so the anchor is laid out before its geometry is sampled. Upstream mounts its fixed particle root on document.body over the viewport, so it is not clipped by this height. Do not use vh or percentage heights for the stage.

boot.widget: unsupported:party.js 2.2.0 的公开 API 固定把全局 #party-js-container 挂到 document.body,无法把粒子根落入 widget shadowRoot；违反 widget 零足迹要求。

example._why_no_minimal: 只有锚点、模板和数量范围三个浅字段,无需 minimal；空态把数量范围置零。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:DOM 粒子根注入 document.body,元素锚点必须已完成布局
carriers.widget: unsupported:粒子根固定越出 shadowRoot 且使用全局 id,无法满足 widget 零足迹
carriers.codex: supported:sandbox iframe 内 document.body 隔离可承接全局粒子根；无 CSS/图片/font CDN

isolation.evidence: Bundle appends its particle-root container to document.body (`...userSelect:'none',zIndex:...},document.body)` + appendChild x2; container id prefix `party-js`), corroborating catalog's #party-js-container claim. Styles are inline on that container (not a document.head <style>), so no head injection. No persistent window/document listener found (grep empty); it drives a global requestAnimationFrame loop instead. Particle root is fixed to document.body and cannot be redirected into a shadowRoot via the public API — catalog widget=unsupported is correct.
